narrative:
Piketon Village (precinct in Pike County) has 1,308 registered voters, with 60.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.0%, a narrow Democratic lean of 0.4 percentage points.
